calendar.matters:
PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jul-05-2016 Text Ruling

SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF EXAMINATION CALENDAR
Off Calendar May-16-2016 Discharged

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-03-2016 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearance on Thursday, March 3, 2016 in Department 525:
Bihua Xu, Respondent/Plaintiff appears as Propria Persona. Court appointed Cantonese interpreter, Bonnie Chow and interpreter's Oath is on file with the Court.

Peihong Yan, Appellant/Defendant appears as Propria Persona with witnesses Antonia Lee and Xiaohuan Huang. No Appearance by Jiewen Huang. Court appointed Cantonese interpreter, Amanda Peeters and interpreter's Oath is on file with the Court.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn.
Bihua Xu testifies on her own behalf and responds to the questions from the Court through Court appointed Cantonese interpreter Bonnie Chow.

Peihong Yan testifies on her own behalf and responds to the questions from the Court through Court appointed Cantonese interpreter Amanda Peeters. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit (1) - photos, repair invoices, & rental contract.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes this matter under submission. Newly marked evidence is retained. Plaintiff's Exhibits from Small Claims is retained.

Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles; Clerk J. Kong; Matter Not Reported.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jan-20-2016 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Dec-03-2015 Continued To Jan-19-16 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 506
